description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a mix of wood and dark stone cladding on the exterior. The front features a manicured lawn, a paved driveway, and a main entrance with a large glass door and side windows. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, wooden deck, lounge chairs, and an outdoor dining area under a pergola. The upper floor includes a balcony with outdoor seating, accessible from the interior. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across all sides, providing ample natural light. The property is enclosed by a fence and includes two parked cars, one in a covered carport.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roof, wood and stone exterior, large windows, a pool, balcony, and fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, manicured lawn, driveway, and carport with two cars.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the upper balcony, carport, and the start of the backyard with pool and deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the swimming pool, wooden deck, outdoor dining area, and large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the solid wall with minimal windows and the fenced grassy yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with large glass door, side windows, paved steps, and no porch or overhang
